requirement_topic.en: SON MANCAP Mandatory Product Certification — Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: SON MANCAP强制产品认证——空调器与热泵
requirement_topic.zht: SON MANCAP強制產品認證——空調器與熱泵

summary.en: The Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON) administers the Mandatory Conformity Assessment Programme (MANCAP), which requires listed electrical and electronic products — including air conditioners and heat pumps — to obtain SON product certification and bear the MANCAP conformity mark before import clearance or sale in Nigeria. SON pre-shipment inspection or conformity assessment by an SON-accredited body is required. NIS standards for safety adopt IEC 60335-2-40 for heat pump appliances. China CCC certification is not recognised as equivalent and does not substitute SON MANCAP.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚标准组织（SON）主管强制符合性评定计划（MANCAP），要求列名电子电气产品——包括空调器和热泵——在进入尼日利亚清关或销售前取得SON产品认证并加贴MANCAP合格标志。须由SON认可机构进行装运前检验或符合性评定。热泵电器安全NIS标准采用IEC 60335-2-40。中国CCC认证不被视为等效，不能替代SON MANCAP。
summary.zht: 尼日利亞標準組織（SON）主管強制符合性評定計劃（MANCAP），要求列名電子電氣產品——包括空調器和熱泵——在進入尼日利亞清關或銷售前取得SON產品認證並加貼MANCAP合格標誌。須由SON認可機構進行裝運前檢驗或符合性評定。熱泵電器安全NIS標準採用IEC 60335-2-40。中國CCC認證不被視為等效，不能替代SON MANCAP。

standards_or_laws: Standards Organisation of Nigeria Act (SON Act)
NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Heat pumps, air-conditioners, and dehumidifiers)
SON pre-shipment inspection and conformity assessment requirements

summary.en: Chinese heat pumps and air conditioners up to 40 kW rated output are subject to mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA, tested to GB 4706.32 (safety for household appliances including heat pumps and air conditioners) and GB 4343.1 (EMC). CCC is a China domestic market mandatory scheme; it is not recognised by SON and provides no exemption from the MANCAP requirement.
summary.zh: 额定输出功率不超过40 kW的中国热泵和空调器须依据CNCA主管的强制性产品认证（CCC），按GB 4706.32（家用电器安全，含热泵和空调器）和GB 4343.1（电磁兼容）进行测试。CCC为中国国内市场强制制度，不被SON认可，不豁免MANCAP要求。
summary.zht: 額定輸出功率不超過40 kW的中國熱泵和空調器須依據CNCA主管的強制性產品認證（CCC），按GB 4706.32（家用電器安全，含熱泵和空調器）和GB 4343.1（電磁相容）進行測試。CCC為中國國內市場強制制度，不被SON認可，不豁免MANCAP要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA
GB 4706.32 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners, and dehumidifiers)
GB 25454 (Heat pump water heaters) / GB/T 7725 (Room air conditioners)

gap.en: CCC does not substitute SON MANCAP. Chinese exporters must engage with SON or an accredited conformity assessment body to obtain MANCAP certification to NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 before shipment to Nigeria. Pre-shipment inspection is mandatory. Existing CCC test reports may provide supporting technical data but will not be accepted as a substitute for SON conformity assessment. ETLS (ECOWAS Trade Liberalisation Scheme) may affect tariffs but does not waive SON MANCAP certification.
gap.zh: CCC不能替代SON MANCAP。中国出口商须在向尼日利亚装运前，通过SON或获认可的符合性评定机构，依据NIS/IEC 60335-2-40取得MANCAP认证。装运前检验为强制要求。现有CCC测试报告可作为辅助技术资料，但不被接受为SON符合性评定的替代证明。ETLS（西共体贸易自由化计划）可能影响关税，但不免除SON MANCAP认证要求。
gap.zht: CCC不能替代SON MANCAP。中國出口商須在向尼日利亞裝運前，透過SON或獲認可的符合性評定機構，依據NIS/IEC 60335-2-40取得MANCAP認證。裝運前檢驗為強制要求。現有CCC測試報告可作為輔助技術資料，但不被接受為SON符合性評定的替代證明。ETLS（西共體貿易自由化計劃）可能影響關稅，但不免除SON MANCAP認證要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SON MANCAP certification and pre-shipment inspection required for import and sale in Nigeria
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market (CCC under CNCA); not accepted as equivalent by SON

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — SON MANCAP certification to NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 is mandatory for import and sale; CCC is not recognised. Pre-shipment inspection required before Nigeria customs clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——依据NIS/IEC 60335-2-40的SON MANCAP认证为进口和销售的强制要求；CCC不被认可。尼日利亚海关清关前须完成装运前检验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——依據NIS/IEC 60335-2-40的SON MANCAP認證為進口和銷售的強制要求；CCC不被認可。尼日利亞海關清關前須完成裝運前檢驗。
